accepted_human_dispositions.notes: Operator override: targeted VLM rejected because watermarked_source_pdf was present. VLM accepted question boundary=true, diagram presence=true, cross-page continuity=n/a. The watermarked-shard contract treats a watermark as a review reason, not an automatic blocker, when the question is complete and legible and the watermark does not occlude required content. Original VLM notes: Watermark present at bottom: '老师微信：liuxue119118 (题目有修改过，请加微信确认是否完整，以免影响您的学习！)'. This violates source integrity per review reason 'watermarked_source_pdf'. Question content is otherwise legible and complete (single page, no diagrams required, clear boundary).
